text: The total quantity of oil discharged at sea on new tankers must not exceed:

options.text: 1/15000 of the total quantity of that particular cargo of which the residue formed part
1/2000 of the total quantity of that particular cargo of which the residue formed part
1/25000 of the total quantity of that particular cargo of which the residue formed part
1/30000 of the total quantity of that particular cargo of which the residue formed part
